summary: The New Skill Limit applies to the process

mechanics.name_guess: The New Skill Limit applies to the process
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 061 > npcs > The New Skill Limit applies to the process
mechanics.excerpt: The New Skill Limit applies to the process of determining skills after the Life Path ends (see p. 57). After skill bonuses are calculated this number restricts the additional skills the player can give his or her character using leftover Skill Points As in the Life Path listed traits gained from age cancel out those diamctricallv opposite For example , character has Toughness but is Vefy Old, he or she loses the Toughness Trait rather than gaining Ihe Glass Jaw Trait The modifiers listed for each age category are not cumula tive: only appl} those for the oldest category reached.
